07月20日.description: PraisonAI application combines AutoGen and CrewAI or similar frameworks into a low-code solution for building and managing multi-agent LLM systems, focusing on simplicity, customisation, and efficient human-agent collaboration. Chat with your ENTIRE Codebase.

07月20日.zh_des: 为gpt/glm等llm大语言模型提供实用化交互接口，特别优化论文阅读/润色/写作体验，模块化设计，支持自定义快捷按钮&函数插件，支持python和C++等项目剖析&自译解功能，pdf/LaTeX论文翻译&总结功能，支持并行问询多种llm模型，支持chat gl3等本地模型.接入通义千问、DeepsekCoder、讯飞星火，文心一言、Lama2、rwkv、claude2、Moss等。

07月24日.name: apify /crawlee-python
07月24日.description: Crawlee—A web scraping and browser automation library for Python to build reliable crawlers. Extract data for AI, LLMs, RAG, or GPTs. Download HTML, PDF, JPG, PNG, and other files from websites. Works with BeautifulSoup, Playwright, and raw HTTP. Both headful and headless mode. With proxy rotation.

08月20日.name: mealie-recipes /mealie

08月20日.name: princeton-nlp /SWE-agent
